pages.text: $(8)Territories are only claimable when you have already registered a clan through /wce clan register. You can claim and unclaim territory through the Manage clan screen.$(br2)When a territory is claimed, a Tree Stump block will be set. The Tree Stump will allow you to reclaim territory by shifting around this block.$(br2)By default, territories are protected from other players breaking or placing blocks and opening containers.$(br)
pages.title: Territories

pages.text: $(8)Territories with a percentage above 35% will be able to spawn prey and a low chance of spawning enemy animals.$(br2) You can send patrols to certain territory when you interact with a deputy. It is recommended that you make sure the territory doesn't have too many caves, cliffs, and deep rivers where cats could get stuck or die. $(br2)Cats can only be sent on patrol if they have a valid home set.$(br)
pages.title: Patrols
